overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing vehicle traversal through a futuristic urban downtown during golden hour. The camera follows a car navigating under concrete overpasses, through industrial intersections, and past vibrant neon billboards and colorful hanging street banners.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: driving forward under a massive concrete overpass, following a black sedan through the shadowed corridor

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving steadily ahead under the overpass
group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk parallel to the road

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a covered corridor with structural pillars
dark colored sedan vehicle being followed
futuristic commercial structures with illuminated signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels under a massive concrete overpass during golden hour, with sunlight streaming through gaps in the structure. A black sedan drives ahead while pedestrians walk along the right sidewalk, and distant skyscrapers are visible through the hazy light at the corridor's end.

events.description: vehicle initiates a left turn at the intersection, navigating around other cars

agents.ego_description: executing a left turn at an industrial intersection while navigating between other vehicles

notable_agents.action: dark SUV waiting at the intersection to the left
black car turning left alongside the ego vehicle

entered.detail: network of industrial pipes and scaffolding structures against the skyline
curved elevated highway ramp with concrete supports
orange and white striped construction barriers lining the road edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open industrial intersection bathed in bright sunlight. The vehicle executes a left turn, navigating around other cars while industrial pipelines and elevated highway structures dominate the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital billboard and crosswalk

events.description: pedestrian runs across the yellow striped crosswalk from right to left in front of the vehicle
approaching and entering the shadowed area beneath another concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: driving straight through a commercial intersection, passing a prominent digital billboard on the right

notable_agents.action: person sprinting across the yellow crosswalk from right to left
silver sports car passing through the intersection from the left

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying 'WIDE OPEN' with a colorful human figure
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
broad pedestrian crosswalk with bold yellow stripes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a sunlit commercial district featuring a massive 'WIDE OPEN' digital billboard and palm trees. A pedestrian dashes across the yellow crosswalk, and the vehicle approaches another overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight into shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street with colorful hanging banners

events.description: exiting the overpass shadow into a brightly lit street decorated with colorful overhead banners
vehicle comes to a complete stop behind other cars waiting at a traffic light

agents.ego_description: accelerating through a vibrant downtown corridor with festive banners, then braking to stop in traffic

notable_agents.action: black SUV stopped ahead at the red traffic light
dark sedan merging into the lane from the right side

entered.detail: brief passage under a concrete overpass structure at the segment start
strings of colorful rectangular flags hanging across the street between buildings
multiple large digital advertisement screens mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: After briefly passing under an overpass, the vehicle emerges into a vibrant downtown street adorned with colorful hanging banners strung across the road. The camera passes digital billboards and palm trees before coming to a stop in moderate traffic at a red light, with tall glass skyscrapers lining the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed concrete corridor into a vibrant, sun-drenched downtown district. It begins under a massive overpass where sunlight streams through gaps in the structure, following a black sedan past pedestrians toward distant, hazy skyscrapers. As the vehicle emerges from the corridor, the scene opens into a bright industrial intersection where the camera navigates a left turn amidst elevated highways and pipelines. The movement then shifts into a commercial district characterized by palm trees and a massive digital billboard before the vehicle briefly dips back into shadow under another overpass. Finally, the camera emerges into a colorful downtown street adorned with hanging banners and glass skyscrapers, eventually coming to a stop in moderate traffic at a red light.
